hero.subline: From the free terminal to the complete professional system — GMT covers global equities, the Brazilian market, and your investment club management.

products.title: Choose how you follow the market.
products.subtitle: Three products, each with a clear purpose.
products.mini_desc: The most relevant global and Brazilian market assets, live. Instant access, no account needed.
products.pro_desc: The complete professional terminal. 269 assets, deep research, technical signals, watchlist and price alerts.
products.club_desc: NAV, quota records, performance history and AI report in Portuguese for your investment club.

coverage.title: Global and Brasil, side by side.
coverage.subtitle: Terminal Mini and Terminal Pro cover both markets in real time — without switching tabs.

numbers.title: Built for serious coverage.
numbers.subtitle: Real data from institutional sources, available in Terminal Mini and Terminal Pro.

preview.title: The product, live.
preview.subtitle: Free access to the full terminal. No signup to get started.

final_cta.title: Start with Terminal Mini. Free, now.
final_cta.subtitle: No signup, no credit card. When you want more, Terminal Pro is one click away.

footer.tagline: Global and Brasil market intelligence in one place. Real-time data from eight institutional sources.
footer.disclaimer: © 2026 GMT · For informational purposes only · Not investment advice
footer.data_sources: Data via Yahoo Finance, Finnhub, BRAPI, BCB, FRED and others

terminal_pro.hero_subline: 269 assets in real time, deep research, technical signals, watchlist and alerts — all in an interface designed for the market.
terminal_pro.f_global_desc: 269 assets · equities, FX, crypto, commodities, fixed income
terminal_pro.f_brasil_desc: B3, SELIC, IPCA, yield curve, USD/BRL
terminal_pro.f_research_desc: P/E, EPS, ROE, EBITDA, analyst recommendations
terminal_pro.f_signals_desc: RSI, MACD and real-time technical signals
terminal_pro.f_charts_desc: Interactive charts with overlays and comparisons
terminal_pro.f_watchlist_desc: Save assets and receive price alerts by email
terminal_pro.final_sub: Create a free account and access Terminal Pro now. No credit card required.
terminal_pro.disclaimer: For informational purposes only · Not investment advice

clube.hero_subline: NAV, quota records, performance history and AI report in Portuguese — everything a club manager needs, in one platform.
clube.persona_gestor_desc: Records weekly NAV, tracks performance vs benchmark and generates the report for quota holders.
clube.persona_cotistas_desc: Track portfolio evolution, view their participation and read the monthly report before meetings.
clube.persona_ai_desc: One click generates the club report in Portuguese — market analysis, performance and macro context.
clube.feat_nav_desc: Record quota value weekly. The system calculates accumulated returns, monthly and vs benchmark.
clube.feat_members_desc: Add members, record quotas held and track the individual portfolio of each quota holder.
clube.feat_report_desc: Generate a complete narrative report before each meeting. Covers performance, market and macro context — in one click.
clube.feat_access_desc: Only members invited by the manager can access the club. Each holder sees only their club's data.
clube.final_sub: Talk to us to set up your club's access on the platform.
clube.disclaimer: For informational purposes only · Not investment advice

mini.upgrade_desc: Terminal Pro covers 269 assets, research, signals and watchlist.
mini.data_sources: Data via Yahoo Finance, BRAPI, CoinGecko

locked.chart_center_desc: Interactive charts with multiple timeframes, technical overlays and asset comparisons — all in one professional view.
locked.research_desc: A complete workspace for deep asset research — fundamentals, news, analyst recommendations and earnings history in one screen.
locked.fundamental_lab_desc: Compare multiple assets side by side on fundamental metrics. Identify relative value and build investment theses with structured data.
locked.macro_hub_desc: Global and Brazilian macroeconomic dashboards — interest rates, inflation, GDP, economic calendar and risk indicators in real time.
locked.signal_engine_desc: Real-time technical signal scanner. RSI, MACD, moving averages and automatic alerts for the assets you follow.

auth_panel.error_name: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth_panel.error_pw_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth_panel.error_pw_upper: Password needs at least one uppercase letter.
auth_panel.error_pw_digit: Password needs at least one digit.
auth_panel.error_pw_special: Password needs at least one special character.
